channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Le DJI Avata 2 est prêt à partir à la conquête des airs avec un prix réduit de presque 100 euros pendant les Ventes Flash d’Amazon
item.description: Le DJI Avata 2 est un drone qui se manie facilement grâce au casque Goggles 3 et à sa télécommande fournie. Chez Amazon, l'appareil peut être trouvé pour 526 euros.

item.title: Meta reportedly considering layoffs that could affect 20% of the company
item.description: These layoffs could help Facebook's parent company offset its aggressive spending on AI infrastructure, as well as AI-related acquisitions and hiring.

item.title: While You Wait for ‘Crystal Lake’, This Fan Film Celebrates ‘Friday the 13th’ in Style
item.description: Another horror icon makes its way into animation with the 'Friday the 13th' fan film 'Ghosts in the Fog.'

item.title: Deepfake worries hit a new high as one in four Americans say they have received a deepfake voice call in the past 12 months — experts blame 'the weaponization of AI'
item.description: Deepfake AI voice scams are rising, spam calls overwhelm users, and many Americans demand carriers take responsibility for protection.

item.title: Meta is reportedly planning to cut up to 20 percent of its staff in upcoming layoffs
item.description: Meta could be preparing for one of the largest layoffs in its history, according to a Reuters report. The tech giant is planning to cut about 20 percent of its workforce, according to the outlet's sources. According to the report, neither a date nor the exact number of layoffs has been finalized yet. However, Reuters reported that Meta's top executives have told "other senior leaders" to start "planning how to pare back." In its latest financial report, the company's employee headcount was 78,865 as of December 31, 2025, while revenue reached nearly $60 billion for the fourth quarter and more ...

item.title: As people look for ways to make new friends, here are the apps promising to help
item.description: We've compiled a list of friendship apps, from friend discovery platforms like BFF to event-focused ones like Timeleft.

item.title: I tested my favorite Bose and B&O audiophile Bluetooth speakers in a head-to-head showdown — here's the one I'd buy with my own money
item.description: I've tested over 40 Bluetooth speakers, and after pitting these similarly priced Bang & Olufsen and Bose models against one another, there's only one I'd actually buy.

item.title: Hulu, Disney Plus, and the Pixel Watch 4 are among this week’s best deals
item.description: Happy Saturday, all! This week, we found a number of deals that should help you unwind and relax over the next few days (and beyond). If you’re planning to stream the Oscars on Sunday, there’s still time to take advantage of a great deal on Hulu and Disney Plus, as well as Google’s latest 4K […]

item.title: Digg shuts down for a 'hard reset' because it was flooded with bots
item.description: Digg has shut down, for now, just a few months after its open beta launched. Justin Mezzell, the company’s CEO, has explained on the home page that it noticed hours after the beta launched that it was already being targeted by SEO spammers. “The internet is now populated, in meaningful part, by sophisticated AI agents and automated accounts,” he wrote. Apparently, the Digg team wasn’t ready for the scale and the speed at which bots found and started flooding the website.Mezzell said Digg banned thousands of accounts and deployed both internal tools and external solutions, but they weren’t enou...

item.title: ECOVACS T90 Pro OMNI : comment Ecovacs a rendu son aspirateur robot plus puissant, plus agile et plus silencieux sans augmenter le prix [Sponso]
item.description: ECOVACS vient de dévoiler son nouveau robot aspirateur, le ECOVACS T90 Pro OMNI. Les promesses sont franchement alléchantes : il est particulièrement puissant (30 000 Pa), silencieux et son tarif est vraiment raisonnable.

item.title: Prediction markets want the Oscars to be your gateway drug to betting on everything
item.description: Though it was weird to see the Golden Globes partner with Polymarket for its most recent awards show, the collaboration wasn't shocking given the way that people have begun using prediction markets to gamble on basically anything. Prediction markets are being used to bet on everything from when wars might break out to who will […]

item.title: The futurist who helped define tech trend reports just killed them (literally)
item.description: At SXSW, Amy Webb declared the end of the annual trend report—and warned that leaders are missing the bigger story. Unless you spend your time in boardrooms and C-suites, there’s a decent chance you’ve never heard of the Future Today Strategy Group (FTSG). There’s also a better than decent chance you’ve encountered its influence. Every year the consulting firm publishes a massive tech trends report that maps emerging threats, white spaces, and opportunities early enough for companies to act on them. Past editions have flagged shifts around synthetic media, digital humans, and generative AI bef...

item.title: New Website ‘Channel Surfer’ Reinvents the Cable TV Couch Vegetation Experience for 2026
item.description: Turn on, tune in, drop out.

item.title: MacBook Air M5 review: a small update for the ‘just right’ Mac
item.description: Not much has changed in the new MacBook Air for 2026: It now has the M5 chip, Wi-Fi 7, and faster storage starting at 512GB instead of 256GB. It's just as outstanding a computer as last year's model, even if it's a shame it's $100 more expensive. The bigger change has happened to the Air. […]

item.title: It's hard to equal Resident Evil 4's quality, but Capcom did that for me with Resident Evil Requiem — it just needs one more thing for perfection
item.description: Capcom's critically acclaimed Resident Evil Requiem brought the best of both worlds from the franchise, but it's missing one big thing.

item.title: The Meta Quest 3S VR headset is one of our best entry-level VR headsets — and it's $50 off for a limited time
item.description: The Meta Quest 3S VR headset is one of our best entry-level VR headsets, and Walmart has an impressive $50 discount on the Batman: Arkham Shadow bundle.

item.title: The RedMagic 11 Air is no looker, but you won't find better gaming performance for the money
item.description: RedMagic doubles down on gaming performance with its latest budget device, at the expense of a few quality-of-life features.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Sunday, March 15 (game #1511)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Sunday, March 15 (game #1008)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Sunday, March 15 (game #742)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Nvidia : vous n’utilisez (surement) pas G-Sync correctement, voici comment le configurer
item.description: Nous vous expliquons dans cet article comment configurer la technologie G-Sync sur votre carte graphique Nvidia pour éliminer tout déchirement de l'image tout en bénéficiant d'une latence minimale dans tous vos jeux.

item.title: Sora video generator is coming to ChatGPT, insiders say
item.description: Insiders say OpenAI will integrate Sora 2 model into ChatGPT, turbocharging the chatbot's capabilities.
